title: ARCHIVED - Newfoundland and Labrador - 2022 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Newfoundland and Labrador - 2022 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Newfoundland and Labrador tax Form  NL428 - Newfoundland and Labrador Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return Optional: Newfoundland and Labrador Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  NL428 - Newfoundland and Labrador Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Newfoundland and Labrador tax and credits

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return

#### Newfoundland and Labrador tax
- Form  NL428 - Newfoundland and Labrador Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return
- Optional: Newfoundland and Labrador Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  NL428 - Newfoundland and Labrador Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Newfoundland and Labrador tax and credits
- Newfoundland and Labrador Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet  NL428 - Newfoundland and Labrador Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Newfoundland and Labrador tax and credits
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Newfoundland and Labrador Form NL479 - Newfoundland and Labrador Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial credits to report on your return Schedule NL(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse        or Common-Law Partner Schedule NL(S11) - Newfoundland and Labrador Tuition and Education        Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings

#### Newfoundland and Labrador
- Form NL479 - Newfoundland and Labrador Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial credits to report on your return
- Schedule NL(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse        or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule NL(S11) - Newfoundland and Labrador Tuition and Education        Amounts
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)

### Send us your paper return or use another method to file

#### Print and mail your paper return
- Where to mail your paper T1 return
- Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents

#### File online or use another option
- Find a way to file your taxes
- Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
- Certified tax software
									(electronic filing)
- Authorize a representative
- Community volunteer tax clinic
- Discounter (tax preparer)
